message:
refactor(web): extract handlers, middleware, SSE, and error helpers from web.rs

web.rs contained all HTTP handler logic, middleware definitions, SSE streaming,
and error response helpers in a single ~1500-line file. This extracts each
concern into its own submodule under web/:

- web/error.rs (+52 lines): json_ok/json_err response constructors
- web/handlers.rs (+548 lines): All 7 HTTP route handlers (bookmarks, events,
  panes, ruleset profiles, saved searches, search, health) plus their
  view/response type definitions
- web/middleware.rs (+114 lines): RequestSpanLogger, BodySizeGuard,
  StateInjector middleware, AppState shared state struct
- web/sse.rs (+610 lines): EventStreamChannel enum, SSE streaming endpoint,
  channel parsing, rate-limiting (max_hz), event filtering

web.rs shrinks by ~1270 lines to ~200 lines of server setup and route wiring.
Added #[cfg(test)] gating on imports only needed by test assertions
(e.g. Serialize derive, view types used in deserialization checks).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
